provisions.detail: 20 years from 1st day of month hotel opens
10 years on then-current terms (may be materially different)
Rights limited to operating Hotel at approved site only
Term extended for period hotel closed due to casualty
7% of GRR from Channel Bookings, monthly by EFT
3.5% of GRR
1.35% of GRR from Digital Channels
4.5% eligible WOH revenue (2.25% on-property)
All payments by electronic funds transfer. Cannot change bank without notice.
Must pay additional amounts to provide franchisor after-tax receipts equal to pre-tax amounts
No site selection assistance provided. Cannot develop without approval.
Must submit plans; cannot begin construction without approval. Cannot change approved plans.
Must renovate per PIP. Cannot modify PIP without approval.
24 months (new) or 6 months (conversion) from FA signing
Must deposit 5% of total operating revenue monthly into separate account
May be required to upgrade/renovate periodically to comply with then-current standards for new Brand Hotels. No limit on frequency or cost.
Must maintain full Core Management team at all times. All must devote full business time; no concurrent lodging positions.
GM candidate must be submitted for approval. May be required to replace.
Required. Must sign Management Company Rider. May not be Competing Brand Owner.
Within 90 days for all Core Management changes
Within 90 days; max 20 Brand Hotels per revenue manager
Not permitted except as law allows
Health/safety threats
Payment failures, document failures
Most other defaults
Guarantor Monetary Threshold failure
Bankruptcy, $100K+ judgments, ceasing operations, IP challenges, unauthorized transfers, felonies, false books, confidentiality breaches, repeated defaults
On default, franchisor may suspend CRS/GDS/ADS, remove from advertising, suspend fee reductions, refuse support
For all transfers of FA, hotel, assets, or Controlling Ownership Interests
Transferee qualifies, amounts paid, training, may sign then-current FA (materially different), renovation, capital structure assessment, release
Neither franchisee nor controlling owner may conduct public offering
Transfer to approved transferee within 6 months
Only if Exhibit C to FA signed (strategic markets)
No covenant not to compete, but may not be Competing Brand Owner (5+ hotel brand)
None
All obligations under FA — monetary AND non-monetary, including confidentiality and arbitration
Controlling Ownership Interest holders (50%+ of investment capital/equity or management control)
Minimum net worth and liquidity, set before signing, increases annually by CPI
Must provide certified financial statements annually demonstrating threshold compliance
min(60, months remaining) × (Average Monthly Revenue × 3.5% + Average Monthly Channel Revenue × 7%)
150% of standard formula if transfer to Competitor or 3+ related terminations
Lesser of standard damages or Net Recovery
$5,000/day plus costs while failing to de-identify post-termination
Mandatory for all disputes. Location within 10 miles of franchisor's principal address (Chicago, IL).
Illinois (subject to FAA and state law)
Illinois courts for non-arbitrable matters
Must maintain adequate insurance in amounts franchisor periodically specifies
Franchisor may obtain on franchisee's behalf and charge premiums + $200/guest room/year fee
Must reimburse franchisor for all claims from application, development, operation, breach, and proportionate share of defense costs for actions involving Hotel and other Hyatt Network Hotels
Must indemnify for costs due to failure to open on time, including customer reservation cancellations
Franchisor's property. Unlimited access during term. Franchisee may use post-term for hotel-generated data only, subject to data policies.
All inventions/innovations by franchisee are work-for-hire for franchisor
Franchisor has independent, unlimited access to all data
Hotel operates under franchisee's own tradename alongside JdV by Hyatt branding. Franchisor makes no representation about tradename validity.
Required from every lender, ground lessor, fee simple owner, and other interest holders
Must submit and receive approval for all food and beverage operations, concepts, and operators
No pawnshops, gentlemen's clubs, pornography, package liquor, marijuana, gambling without consent. Bar within 300ft cannot derive >50% from alcohol without consent.
Some Participating Hotels may pay less for System Services due to pre-existing Two Roads contracts
